title: Tool-call result envelope
description: Gateway-to-sandbox response shape for every POST /v1/mcp/{mcp}/{tool}. The agent loop feeds this envelope verbatim to the LLM as the tool message.

data.description: Present when ok=true. Validated separately against services/<mcp>/<tool>.response.json.

error.description: Error class. Present when ok=false (e.g. OPA_DENY, MCP_UNAVAILABLE, MCP_TIMEOUT, SCHEMA_VALIDATION_FAILED).
